_comment: Opt-in config for the psotobverse-utils meta-learner (>= v1.4.0). Its PRESENCE activates the SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/SessionEnd hooks for THIS repo; absent => the plugin's hooks no-op. Domain = building the factory (skills/plugins/hooks/MCP/RAG), so consensus signals track Anthropic agent-building conventions and route to STANDARDS_WATCH.md.
label: datavidence-factory
